tasks.dev: deno task prepare && deno run -A vite dev
tasks.build:static: deno task prepare && deno run -A @sveltejs/kit sync && deno run -A vite build
tasks.build:static:prebuilt: deno run -A @sveltejs/kit sync && deno run -A vite build
tasks.build: deno task prepare && deno run -A vite build
tasks.preview: deno task prepare && deno run -A vite preview
tasks.check: deno task prepare && deno run -A @sveltejs/kit sync && deno run -A svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.check.json
